data.text/markdown:
🎮 Ultimate Tic-Tac-Toe — Game State Explorer

A symmetry-reduced game-state graph where each node is a unique board position under all 8 dihedral symmetries (4 rotations × 2 reflections). States are identified by their canonical FEN key — the lexicographically smallest encoding across all equivalent board orientations. Adjust the sliders to control search depth and node budget, then click a node in the graph to inspect that board state.

data.text/html:
🎮 Play Against the Bot (MCTS)

You are X, bot is O. Pick your move from the table.
⚙️ Graph Parameters

data.text/markdown: 118 canonical nodes · 117 edges · depth 0: 1 | depth 1: 15 | depth 2: 102
